result:
**Goal: Add a split-screen dual simulation mode that runs two simulations side-by-side in the terminal.**

This would let users run any two of the 135 modes simultaneously — e.g., compare Conway's Life against Lenia, watch a Boids flock next to an N-Body gravity sim, or pit two rule variants against each other in real time. Each pane gets half the terminal width with independent state, and a toggle key swaps which pane receives input. This builds naturally on the existing mode system, leverages the truecolor rendering pipeline, and turns the simulator into a powerful comparison and experimentation tool.
